name: Chocolate Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare the batter, combine cake mix and baking powder in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine oil, almond extract, cherry pie filling, and egg whites.
5. Mix dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Let cool and cut into squares before adding topping.
9. To prepare the topping, combine sugar, margarine, and milk in a saucepan.
10. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, and boil 1 minute.
11. Remove from heat and add chocolate chips.
12. Stir until melted.
13. Pour over cake and spread.
